name: Chicken in Black Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Chicken fryer; cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken, pat dry, and season with garlic powder, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a deep casserole over medium heat. Brown the chicken, remove it from the casserole, and set aside.
3. In the same oil, sauté onions until limp. Add garlic, being careful not to let it burn.
4. Stir in flour. Add vinegar, wine, broth, and bay leaves; stir well.
5. Return the chicken to the casserole, cover, and cook slowly for about 50 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken to a warm platter. Add chocolate to the sauce and stir until the chocolate is dissolved.
7. Return the chicken to the casserole, baste with the sauce, and simmer covered for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Serve with white rice or boiled new potatoes. Serves 4.
